data.text: AN INTERESTING PLANET. FROM SPACE, IT ALMOST LOOKS LIKE A FELYSIAN
WORLD. THE BLUE SKY MAKES IT SEEM EVEN MORE SO. I BELIEVE THAT THE
WEAK GRAVITY OF THIS WORLD LET A POTENTIAL LIFEGIVING ATMOSPHERE
ESCAPE INTO SPACE OVER TIME, LEAVING THIS GREY HUSK OF A THINWORLD.
IT'S EVEN VISIBLE WHERE THE LAKES AND OCEANS WOULD HAVE BEEN!
